fields.name: title
fields.label: Form Title
fields.description: Heading displayed on the left briefing panel. Use a newline to split the title across two lines.

fields.name: subtitle
fields.label: Form Subtitle
fields.description: Supporting copy shown beneath the heading.
fields.value: Tell us about your military life, interests, and preferences. We will tailor shopping, events, and family programs around your world.

fields.name: redirect
fields.label: Redirect URL
fields.description: Optional page to navigate to after successful submission.
